kawhi leonard.detail: Played 30 minutes and sat out the fourth quarter in a blowout loss
kawhi leonard.web_narrative: Leonard played only 30 minutes and did not play in the fourth quarter as the Thunder built an early 25-point lead; this appears to be a blowout-driven reduction rather than an injury, though the recap notes no explicit rest decision.

nikola jokic.detail: Played 31 minutes and did not play in the fourth quarter with Denver holding a large lead
nikola jokic.web_narrative: Jokic was held out of the fourth quarter as the Nuggets cruised to a comfortable win, a common rest/maintenance decision late in the regular season with Denver having secured its playoff positioning.

shai gilgeous-alexander.detail: Played 30 minutes and sat out the fourth quarter with OKC holding a large lead
shai gilgeous-alexander.web_narrative: Gilgeous-Alexander was rested in the fourth quarter after Oklahoma City built an early 25-point lead, a routine decision to manage the star player's workload in a clinching blowout win.
